scripts.build: next build && npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build --skipNextBuild && rm -rf .cloudflare && cp -R .open-next .cloudflare && mv .cloudflare/worker.js .cloudflare/_worker.js && cp -r .cloudflare/assets/* .cloudflare/ && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const publicFiles = fs.readdirSync('public').map(f => '/' + f); const routes = { version: 1, include: ['/*'], exclude: ['/_next/*', '/favicon.ico', ...publicFiles] }; fs.writeFileSync('.cloudflare/_routes.json', JSON.stringify(routes))"
